sub_modules.harris_sobel3x3: Purely combinational 3x3 Sobel gradient operator producing signed Ix and Iy.
sub_modules.harris_gradient_products: Purely combinational gradient-product stage computing Ix squared, Iy squared, and Ix times Iy.
sub_modules.harris_gaussian3x3: Purely combinational 3x3 Gaussian smoothing filter with kernel [1 2 1; 2 4 2; 1 2 1] divided by 16.
sub_modules.harris_response: Purely combinational fixed-point Harris response calculator using det(M) minus k times trace(M)^2.
sub_modules.harris_threshold: Purely combinational pointwise threshold decision stage producing the binary corner flag.
